text: Plan { directive: BrewAlcohol, reason: "Booze reserves are below safe dwarven survival threshold." }

Within The First Black Hall, 7 souls gather beneath uncertain stone. Recent omens: The expedition has struck the earth. A temporary shelter is required before nightfall. The Engine completed observation cycle 1. The Engine has chosen BrewAlcohol: Booze reserves are below safe dwarven survival threshold.
